rule_text: The box's left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap, approximately W/2 + 24px (64px when W=80px). Copy must never slide under the badge.
intent: Prevent text from colliding with the overhanging badge.
summary: Left padding equals badge width/2 plus 24px gap (e.g., 64px if W=80px) ensuring copy doesn't underlap the overhanging badge.
